result.summary: The page is mostly usable, but several areas look clipped or obscured, especially around horizontally scrolling content and the fixed bottom navigation.

issues.description: Several right-side items are visibly cut off, including the “Hot Games” tab and the third game card in each row. This may be intended as a horizontal carousel, but visually it looks like content is overflowing the viewport without a clear cue.
issues.suggestion: If these are carousels, add clearer horizontal-scroll affordances, spacing, or snap behavior. If not intended, constrain the layout to the viewport and avoid partial clipping.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game grid content. The lower game cards are partially hidden behind the nav bar.
issues.suggestion: Add enough bottom padding/margin to the scrollable content so the final rows can clear the fixed bottom navigation.

issues.description: The carousel/banner navigation arrows sit very close to the screen edges and the right arrow appears partially clipped.
issues.suggestion: Move carousel controls inward slightly or increase the banner’s horizontal padding so controls are fully visible and easier to tap.

issues.description: Some labels are truncated by clipping, such as the top tab text beginning “Hot Ga…”.
issues.suggestion: Ensure tab labels either fit within their pill, use a proper ellipsis, or remain fully readable when horizontally scrolled into view.
